creator: rtdean@cytherianage.net
text:
The upgrade applied in ports/136575 'upgraded' Catalyst::Plugin::Authentication to an old version that is missing functionality present in the previously ported version. 

The 'upgrade' took us from version 0.10012 (released 2009-06-06) to 0.100091 (released 2008-11-29), while the latest version is 0.10013 (released 2009-06-19).  

This upgrade has broken a number of my applications and as a result I've had to uninstall the ports supported version of Catalyst::Plugin::Authentication and replace it 
with the cpan/bsdpan installed copy.  

I'd ask very kindly that we not regress this application and that 0.10012 be restored or the correct update to 0.10013 be applied.

Fix: 

Revert the commit from ports/136575, and optionally work up an upgrade to the latest release (0.10013) instead of a random release from last year.
